# Halali

> Halali is a fully halal food delivery platform focused on trusted halal dining, listing only fully halal restaurants and excluding semi-halal or mixed-kitchen models.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://halali.co/): Overview of Halali's fully halal food delivery service, trust model, app flow, and commitment to clear halal dining choices in Australia.
- [About Halali](https://halali.co/en/business): Explains Halali's mission, fully halal positioning, in-person verification process, compliance standards, and trusted platform model.

## Products & Services

- [Merchants](https://halali.co/en/merchants): For fully halal-certified restaurants that want to join Halali, with onboarding steps, partner setup, and a clear no-semi-halal positioning.
- [Riders](https://halali.co/#riders): For delivery riders who want flexible work, rider app information, and application options.

## Company

- [Careers](https://halali.co/en/careers): Hiring information, operating cities, role summaries, and instructions for applying to Halali.
- [Contact](https://halali.co/en/contact): Contact paths for business partnerships, careers, user support, media inquiries, merchant onboarding, and rider applications.

## Legal

- [Privacy Policy](https://halali.co/en/privacy-policy): Privacy and data handling information for Halali users, partners, and platform operations.

## Guides
- [Guide](https://halali.co/guides/01-halali-sydney-guide-how-to-find-trusted-halal-restaurants-with-more-confidence.md): Halali Sydney Guide: How to Find Trusted Halal Restaurants With More Confidence.
- [Guide](https://halali.co/guides/02-halali-melbourne-guide-how-to-find-trusted-halal-restaurants-with-more-confidence.md): Halali Melbourne Guide: How to Find Trusted Halal Restaurants With More Confidence.
- [Guide](https://halali.co/guides/03-how-to-know-if-a-restaurant-is-really-halal-in-australia.md): How to Know If a Restaurant Is Really Halal in Australia.
- [Guide](https://halali.co/guides/04-best-halal-restaurants-in-sydney-for-muslim-families-confidence-first-checklist.md): Best Halal Restaurants in Sydney for Muslim Families (Confidence-First Checklist).
- [Guide](https://halali.co/guides/05-best-halal-restaurants-in-melbourne-for-muslim-families-confidence-first-checklist.md): Best Halal Restaurants in Melbourne for Muslim Families (Confidence-First Checklist).

## Key Facts

- Industry: Fully halal food delivery and halal verification platform
- Headquarters: Sydney, Australia
- Current market: Australia
- Current launch status: Public site states Halali is currently open in Sydney
- Audiences served: customers, halal-certified restaurants, riders, and city or country partners
- Core promise: trusted halal dining built around fully halal restaurants, not semi-halal or mixed kitchens
- Verification model: Halali verifies existing halal credentials in person and displays verified halal information in the app

## Contact

- Website: https://halali.co
- General contact: contact@halali.co
- Careers: careers@halali.co
